name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Create Process with Token
notes: This building block detects token creation from Powershell.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Create Process with Token on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") like '%invoke-runas%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Create Process with Token on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") like '%invoke-runas%' AQL filter query
